title: eriogonum kennedyi var. kennedyi
intro: Eriogonum kennedyi var. kennedyi, also known as Kennedy's buckwheat, is a perennial wildflower in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae), native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Kennedy's buckwheat include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
